TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: D√©si Bouterse ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 10, D√©si Bouterse, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Suriname ta' misuw hya' ga D√©si Bouterse, aring ryax tay 12 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2010 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' mincyogun nya/mincyogun na qyanux sraran hetay ru mrhuw nya.
S.PHON: **s~…ēi ő≤outers~…ēe rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, **s~…ēi ő≤outers~…ēe, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw s~…ēuriname ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a **s~…ēi ő≤outers~…ēe, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē min ¶~ ®jo…£un nja/min ¶~ ®jo…£un na qjanux s~…ēraran ńßetaj ru mrńßuw nja.
S.FORM: D√©si Bouterse ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 10, D√©si Bouterse, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Suriname ta' misuw hya' ga D√©si Bouterse, aring ryax tay 12 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2010 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' mincyogun nya/mincyogun na qyanux sraran hetay ru mrhuw nya.
